creator: amzo1337@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 226491
Fix installation of the pip package

This will fix the above issue. I didn't submit the fix yet as I have an open issue on the tensorflow git regarding the incomplete packaging of tensorflow on FreeBSD.

There are still parts of the tensorflow package which are failing to be bundle, such as keras, etc.

https://github.com/tensorflow/tensorflow/issues/50766

Though. I am unsure if getting the package to work is worth it. The highest tensorflow able to build currently that I have tested is 2.2.0. Anything elses requires creating a new toolchain due to the way bazel fetches them remotely which isn't something that is feasible for one person to maintain and create.
